text:
One Last Kiss is a music video of the song of the same name by Hikaru Utada. It was directed by Hideaki Anno https://www.evangelion.co.jp/news/shin_themesong/ and released on the Hikaru Utada official YouTube channel on 09 March 2021. The song was used as the ending theme of the film Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time.

Staff

Director: Hideaki Anno
